title: CPVP Performance+
description: A CPVP Modpack designed to give more FPS and Performance, focused towards CPVP and PVP Players.
body:
A CPVP Modpack designed to give more FPS and Performance, focused towards CPVP and PVP Players. This uses Fabric as a base to load the Mods. This is a optimised ModPack for **High FPS** and **Responsiveness**, designed around CPVP. 

Mods Used:

- Armor Hud

- Client Side Crystals

- Cloth Config API

- Cubes Without Borders

- Dynamic FPS

- Entity Culling

- Fabric API

- Fabric Language Kotlin

- FerriteCore

- HUD Lib

- ImmediatelyFast

- Info Overlay (aka FPS Overlay)

- Krypton

- Lithium

- Marlow's Crystal Optimizer

-  MidnightLib

- Mod Menu

- More Chat History

- More Culling

- Simple Voice Chat

- Sodium

- Sodium Extra

- Text Placeholder API

- Totem Bar

- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)   


Logo made with the help of **Canva.**

**Licensing Note:** This modpack is an independent project and is NOT officially associated with or endorsed by the original developers any included mod or resource pack. All mods included in this ModPack are open-source and used under their respective licenses (mostly MIT or GPL).
